/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MyEngineEditor.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MyEngineEditor.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MyEngineEditor.dir/src/Editor/EditorLayer.cpp.o -o MyEngineEditor  -Wl,-rpath,/home/runner/work/MyEngine/MyEngine/build_linux/_deps/sdl3-build libMyEngineRuntime.a libMyEngineImGui.a libMyEngineGame.a libMyEngineRuntime.a _deps/sdl3-build/libSDL3.so.0.2.14
